summary: Completed full end-to-end testing of Vargas & Zúñiga single-viewport redesign (iteration 4). Backend POST /api/contact validated (creation + Pydantic 422 validation + unique IDs). Frontend: header, 6-section navigation (click + arrows + keyboard), home/studio/clients/lawyers/areas/contact sections, lawyer tab switching, contact form submission with persistence, ES↔EN language toggle with localStorage persistence, mobile menu (390x844), embedded chat widget opening, emergent badge hidden, body overflow:hidden, footer counter — all working without console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: ContactCreate.email uses str with min_length=3 — does NOT enforce email format. Consider EmailStr (pydantic[email]) for stricter validation. Currently 'a@' would pass.
Footer renders QR via api.qrserver.com on every section render — fine, but could be memoized to avoid re-fetch on language toggle.
No rate limiting on POST /api/contact — spam risk in production (out of MVP scope but worth noting).
seed_data_creation: Created a few TEST_-prefixed contact_messages docs via API tests; harmless.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (pytest). Frontend has data-testid for every interactive element. Body has overflow:hidden — page fits exactly in 1920x1080. Each section is mounted/unmounted via key={section} in App.js section-shell, triggering section-enter fade. Chat widget panel id is #vyz-widget-panel, opens with class 'vyz-open' on click of home-cta-chat. Language persists in localStorage key 'vyz-lang'.
rca of the issue: No issues found in this iteration.
